name: loop
description: Loop combines Ultracode's parallel Codex worker orchestration with Fable 5 prompt review and stop-hook course correction.

interface.longDescription: Loop combines the Ultracode subprocess-backed workflow engine with Fable 5 peer review hooks. It can run parallel Codex worker workflows, inject a Fable-reviewed working brief at prompt submit, and use Stop-hook feedback to continue when Fable finds concrete unfinished work or course correction. Fable can inspect workspace files and current web context with read-only tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Loop to investigate this change
Run Loop workers on this bug
